Comfortable Accommodation: Elins gjestehus in Egersund offers three bedrooms and a living room. The property includes family rooms and a private entrance.
Outdoor Spaces: Guests can enjoy a garden and terrace with garden views. The terrace features outdoor furniture and a dining area.
